name: AlphaSense, Inc.
lede: AlphaSense runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Pune, covering gcc/gic and it, built over seven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AlphaSense office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AlphaSense, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AlphaSense runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Pune), covering gcc/gic and it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AlphaSense operate in India?
faq.a: AlphaSense operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.a: AlphaSense's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Pune.

faq.q: How many people work at AlphaSense's India GCCs?
faq.a: AlphaSense's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AlphaSense's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at AlphaSense's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
